criteria.criterion: At least 3 named competitor apps are analyzed with specific feature comparisons (not generic categories)
Target user persona includes age range, occupation, and a concrete pain point with a real-world example
Differentiation strategy is derived from the competitor analysis gaps, not stated generically
At least 3 risks are identified with specific mitigation strategies for each
Market size estimate is provided with a quantitative basis or cited source
Next.js suitability is evaluated against the specific app requirements (SSR vs SSG vs ISR trade-offs discussed)
External API dependencies are listed by name with rate limits or cost implications noted
Vercel deployment constraints relevant to the app are assessed (serverless timeout, bundle size, etc.)
Browser API requirements (camera, geolocation, etc.) are listed if applicable, with fallback strategy
